mapper.sql: c.emp_plan_id, c.cnct_sn, c.cnct_se_cd, c.user_nm, c.mblphn_no, c.eml_addr, c.use_bgng_dt, c.use_end_dt, c.frst_reg_dt, c.frst_reg_user_id, c.last_chg_dt, c.last_chg_user_id
mapper.select: SELECT FROM emp.tn_emp_oprtr_cnct c WHERE c.emp_plan_id = #{empPlanId} AND NOW() BETWEEN c.use_bgng_dt AND c.use_end_dt ORDER BY c.cnct_sn ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO emp.tn_emp_oprtr_cnct (emp_plan_id, cnct_sn, cnct_se_cd, user_nm, mblphn_no, eml_addr, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) VALUES (#{empPlanId}, #{cnctSn}, #{cnctSeCd}, #{userNm}, #{mblphnNo}, #{emlAddr}, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{frstRegUserId}, NOW(), #{lastChgUserId})

INSERT INTO emp.tn_emp_oprtr_cnct (emp_plan_id, cnct_sn, cnct_se_cd, user_nm, mblphn_no, eml_addr, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) SELECT #{dstEmpPlanId}, cnct_sn, cnct_se_cd, user_nm, mblphn_no, eml_addr, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{userId}, NOW(), #{userId} FROM emp.tn_emp_oprtr_cnct WHERE emp_plan_id = #{srcEmpPlanId} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
